test_cases.name: health_check_ok
test_cases.description: Verify the health endpoint returns a successful response.

test_cases.name: create_author_valid
test_cases.description: Create a new author with valid required fields.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an author without the required name field.

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_pagination
test_cases.description: List authors with default skip and limit parameters.

test_cases.name: get_author_existing
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing author by ID.

test_cases.name: get_author_not_found
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a non-existent author.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Attempt to update an author with an incorrect If-Match header (ETag mismatch).

test_cases.name: create_book_valid
test_cases.description: Create a new book with all valid required fields.

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with an ISBN that is too short.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: List books with search, author_id, and price filters.

test_cases.name: get_book_soft_deleted
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a book that has been soft-deleted.

test_cases.name: delete_book_soft_delete
test_cases.description: Perform a soft delete on an existing book.

test_cases.name: delete_book_already_deleted
test_cases.description: Attempt to delete a book that is already soft-deleted.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore a previously soft-deleted book.

test_cases.name: create_review_for_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a review for a soft-deleted book.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_exceed_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Exceed the rate limit (5 req/10s) for applying a discount.

test_cases.name: upload_cover_file_too_large
test_cases.description: Attempt to upload a cover image larger than 2 MB.

test_cases.name: upload_cover_unsupported_type
test_cases.description: Attempt to upload a cover image with an unsupported file type (not JPEG/PNG).

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_without_api_key
test_cases.description: Attempt bulk book creation without the required X-API-Key header.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_exceed_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Exceed the rate limit (3 req/30s) for bulk book creation.

test_cases.name: create_order_with_multiple_items
test_cases.description: Create a new order with multiple valid book items.

test_cases.name: create_order_empty_items
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an order with an empty items array.

test_cases.name: update_order_status_valid
test_cases.description: Update an order's status to a valid new status (e.g., shipped).

test_cases.name: update_order_status_invalid_value
test_cases.description: Attempt to update an order's status with a value not in the allowed pattern.

test_cases.name: start_book_export_without_api_key
test_cases.description: Attempt to start a book export job without the required X-API-Key header.

test_cases.name: get_export_job_not_found
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a non-existent export job.

test_cases.name: toggle_maintenance_without_api_key
test_cases.description: Attempt to toggle maintenance mode without the required X-API-Key header.

test_cases.name: get_statistics_without_api_key
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve statistics without the required X-API-Key header.

test_cases.name: deprecated_catalog_redirect
test_cases.description: Verify the deprecated /catalog endpoint returns a 301 redirect to /books.

test_cases.name: add_tags_to_book_empty_list
test_cases.description: Attempt to add tags to a book with an empty tag_ids array (violates minItems: 1).
